goal: Реализовать Host Bridge MVP: первый реальный Android -> Host Bridge -> local Codex runtime path без ухода в полный real thread runtime.
done: previous runtime-contract slice completed and verified
repo, code, official-doc and reference findings collected for Host Bridge MVP

core pre-coding decisions closed: transport=http_json, explicit Android cleartext opt-in plus runtime endpoint validation, first runtime payload=host health/status plus app/list count, address policy=RFC1918 plus .local plus 100.64/10
ExecPlan.md converted into the canonical pointer for the current active milestone document
cleartext contract clarified: exact private-local boundary must be enforced by runtime validation, not assumed to be fully expressible in Android XML policy
auth contract clarified: Android uses Authorization Bearer sessionToken and helper must reject unauthorized requests before local app-server access while redacting the token from logs and diagnostics
current stubbed Connected-Ready host bridge state explicitly marked as non-truth-surface for the real LAN runtime path
codex-security and test-android-apps gates captured for the next milestone

stage 1 completed: transport contract locked to http_json, ws and wss moved to explicit unsupported path, degraded runtime summary contract added, 100.64/10 accepted, 169.254/16 rejected, stubbed LAN permission semantics no longer claim false readiness, and explicit Android cleartext opt-in is expressed via network_security_config
stage 2 completed locally: Windows Host Bridge helper added under tools/hostbridge with bearer auth, stdio app-server client, app/list summary path, degraded caching, and auth-first reject behavior
next: add the Android-side real host bridge client
update milestone checklist and stage report after the next completed stage
verify_status: JetBrains file rebuild passes; stage-1 Android checks are green; python unittest suite and compileall pass for the stage-2 Windows Host Bridge helper
open_questions: diagnostics-only secondary probe if implementation needs it
